notes: MIT AI Risk Repository is a comprehensive database of AI risks with causal and domain taxonomies.

data.description: Comprehensive database of AI risks with causal and domain taxonomies, maintained by MIT researchers.
data.notes: Browsable risk database with causal taxonomy (what causes the risk) and domain taxonomy (what domain is affected). Risks are identified by slug names. The database is searchable and filterable at airisk.mit.edu.

data.note: Browsable risk database — risks can be explored at airisk.mit.edu/risks. No stable per-item URL scheme with formal identifiers.

examples.note: Risks related to discriminatory AI outcomes
Risks related to AI privacy breaches
Risks related to military misuse of AI
